name: Orzo & Pignoli (Pasta & Pine Nuts)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Orzo or other small pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the orzo until al dente; 3 minutes. Drain in a colander.
2. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a small, non-stick skillet over medium heat. Stir in pine nuts and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
3. Add dried basil leaf and toss with cooked orzo. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Heat through and serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 183; Carbohydrates: 29g; Protein: 6g; Sodium: 49mg; Fat: 5g
